education.averageGlucose: Average glucose is calculated over the selected period. It helps assess overall glycemic control.
education.hba1c: Estimated glycated hemoglobin (HbA1c) is calculated from continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) data. It gives an indication of glycemic control over the past 3 months.
education.hypoEvents: Number of detected hypoglycemic episodes. An episode is defined as a glucose reading below {threshold} mg/dL (American Diabetes Association / ADA reference, generic value — your personal targets may differ).
education.timeInRange: Time in Range (TIR) represents the percentage of time spent between {targetMin} and {targetMax} mg/dL (American Diabetes Association / ADA reference, generic value — your personal targets may differ). The recommended target is >= 70%.
education.cv: The coefficient of variation (CV) measures glycemic variability. A value below 36% is considered stable.
education.standardDeviation: Standard deviation measures the dispersion of glucose values around the mean.

emptyState.noDataMessage: Data will appear here once available.

emptyState.insufficientDataMessage: At least {threshold}% data capture is required to display this report.

errors.eventTypesRequired: Select at least one event type
errors.glycemiaValueRange: Glucose must be between 20 and 600 mg/dL
errors.bolusDoseRange: Bolus dose must be between 0 and 25 U
errors.basalDoseRange: Basal dose must be between 0 and 10 U/h
errors.activityDurationRange: Duration must be between 1 and 600 minutes
errors.weightRange: Weight must be between 1 and 300 kg
errors.hba1cRange: Glycated hemoglobin (HbA1c) must be between 4.0 and 14.0 %
errors.ketonesRange: Ketones must be between 0 and 20 mmol/L
errors.systolicPressureRange: Systolic pressure must be between 50 and 300 mmHg
errors.diastolicPressureRange: Diastolic pressure must be between 20 and 200 mmHg

insulinTherapy.title: Insulin Therapy

insulinTherapy.targetGlucoseHint: Target value for correction calculation — between 60 and 250 mg/dL
insulinTherapy.insulinActionDurationHint: Total insulin action duration — between 3.5 and 5 h

isf.title: Insulin Sensitivity Factor (ISF)
isf.description: Glucose reduction per unit of insulin — hourly slots from 0h to 24h

icr.title: Insulin-to-Carb Ratio (ICR)
icr.description: Grams of carbohydrates covered per unit of insulin
icr.noSlotsMessage: Add at least one time slot to enable meal calculations.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Insulin on board (IOB) and extended bolus
advanced.considerIobSubtitle: Deducts residual active insulin from the calculated bolus
advanced.extendedBolusSubtitle: Distributes the bolus over a defined duration (pump only)

adminDashboard.hdsScope: Administrator scope: no access to patients' health data — Health Data Hosting (HDS) segregation.

adminDashboard.staleBadge: Stale ({days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}})

backups.title: PostgreSQL backups
backups.subtitle: Database (DB) backup history + manual trigger. Daily automatic backup via cron (see docs/runbook/postgres-backup.md).

cabinets.title: Practices and facilities
cabinets.subtitle: List of medical practices + hospital facilities. Click to manage settings + SMS V1 mock configuration.

dataBreaches.title: Data breaches — General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), Art. 33
dataBreaches.subtitle: Registry of detected breaches. CNIL notification deadline: 72h after detection (Art. 33 of the General Data Protection Regulation — GDPR).

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: History of issued invoices + drafts. Click for detail and PDF download.

systemHealth.title: System health
systemHealth.subtitle: Real-time status of critical components (DB, Redis, continuous glucose monitoring (CGM), backups). Auto-refresh every 60s.

taxRules.title: Tax rules
taxRules.subtitle: Resolution of the active tax rate for a country + tax type on a given date. Read-only iter 5 — creation/modification via backend operations (see docs/runbook/tax-rules.md).

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Management of user accounts (admins, doctors, nurses, patients). Click for detail + suspension/archival actions.

backupsList.triggerSuccess: Backup triggered (status: pending). The worker will pick it up shortly.
backupsList.confirmDesc: The backup will start immediately (status: pending → running). Estimated duration: 2-15 minutes depending on DB size. The operation is recorded in the audit log.

usersList.tooMany: More than 100 users match. Narrow the filters to reduce the list.

invoicesList.filterHelp: Select a status to filter the invoice list.
invoicesList.tooMany: More than 100 invoices match. Narrow the status filter to reduce the list.
invoicesList.paginationNote: Cursor pagination V1.5 — truncated to the 100 most recent.

userDetail.actionsNote: Role or status changes are recorded in the immutable audit log. Anti-lockout: the last ADMIN cannot be removed (Serializable backend).
userDetail.adminMfaWarning: Promotion to ADMIN disabled: multi-factor authentication (MFA) required for privileged accounts (health data hosting — HDS, ANS reference). The user must first enable multi-factor authentication in their settings.
userDetail.archiveWarning: Archiving revokes all JWT tokens and signs the user out immediately.
userDetail.archiveConfirmWarning: Archiving revokes all JWT tokens — the user will be signed out immediately.
userDetail.adminPromoteWarning: Promotion to ADMIN = full platform access.
userDetail.auditNote: Action recorded in the immutable audit log.

dataBreachesList.declareWarning: ⚠️ DO NOT INCLUDE PHI/PII in the title (audit-log leak prevention).
dataBreachesList.discardDesc: The title and description you entered will be lost. This action is not reversible.

patientDetail.noCgmData: No continuous glucose (CGM) data for the period.
patientDetail.lowCaptureWarning: Insufficient continuous glucose (CGM) capture ({rate}%) — interpret statistics with caution.
patientDetail.sharingDisabledDesc: This patient has disabled sharing their data with care providers.
patientDetail.staleReadingNote: Old reading — may not reflect the current state.
patientDetail.recentOutOfRangeLow: A more recent reading is out of displayable range (possible severe hypoglycemia < 40 mg/dL or sensor "LOW") — check the patient.

patientDetail.slotGapNote: Non-contiguous slots over 24 h — configuration to review.
patientDetail.slotGapNoteBasal: Incomplete basal coverage over 24 h — configuration to review.

patientDashboard.cgmRecentOutOfRangeLow: A more recent reading is out of displayable range (possible severe hypoglycemia < 40 mg/dL or sensor "LOW"). Check your finger-stick glucose and treat if needed.
patientDashboard.cgmRecentOutOfRangeHigh: A more recent reading is out of displayable range (> 500 mg/dL or sensor "HIGH"). Check your finger-stick glucose.

patientDashboard.errorForbidden: Access denied. Sign in again or contact your doctor.
patientDashboard.errorServiceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.

agpPercentileChart.tableCaption: Ambulatory glucose profile — values per 15-minute interval over 7 days. Target {low}-{high} mg/dL.

sessionsSection.confirmRevokeOneDesc: The device will be disconnected immediately.

cabinetDetail.auditTraceNote: Action recorded in the immutable audit log.
cabinetDetail.smsMockDesc: V1 mock: no real SMS sent (provider="mock"). Real Twilio/OVH = US-2506bis V3. Credit is still decremented on the audit side to simulate the cost.

dataBreachDetail.cnilDeadlineDescription: <rgpd></rgpd>, Art. 33 — CNIL notification mandatory within 72h of detection (high/critical severity).
dataBreachDetail.usersNotifiedLabel: Number of notified users (required for the “Users notified” transition)
dataBreachDetail.dialogTransitionDescription: Action recorded in the immutable audit log (CNIL/ANS forensics).<irreversible></irreversible>

invoiceDetail.pdfUnavailable: The PDF is only available for issued invoices. Issue the invoice to generate it.

audit.title: Audit consultation
audit.description: Immutable backend audit log is operational (US-2011 / US-2268) but the consultation interface is not yet delivered. The /api/admin/audit-logs API accepts filters (userId, resource, action, from, to).

review.title: Consultation review mode
review.subtitle: Structured, step-by-step analysis — no artificial intelligence.
review.sharingDisabledDesc: The patient's sharing consent is missing or revoked: no data is shown.
review.lifestylePlaceholder: The lifestyle summary (activity, diet, sleep) will be available in a future version.
review.flagUrgency: An alert is open for this patient.
review.flagRecentHypos: {count} recent hypoglycemia events over the last 7 days.
review.flagSilent: No continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) data for {days} days.
review.lowCaptureWarning: Continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) capture at {rate}%: statistics are weakly representative (international consensus).
review.noCgmData: No continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) data available.
review.recentOutOfRangeLow: A very recent reading is in severe hypoglycemia (outside the display range).
review.recentOutOfRangeHigh: A very recent reading is above the display range.
review.outOfDisplayRangeNote: {count} readings outside the display range — counted in time in range (TIR), not plotted.
review.decisionsHint: Deterministic proposals produced server-side — never applied automatically.
review.decisionsReadOnly: Read-only: only a doctor can accept or reject a proposal.
review.decisionError: The action could not be saved. Please retry.
review.anchorNote: Glycemic data computed over the last {days} days (as of {date}).
review.finalizedNote: This report is finalized and immutable (it can no longer be edited).

cabinetMembers.title: Cabinet personnel & rights
cabinetMembers.subtitle: Manage your cabinet's members and their rights (no access to health data).
cabinetMembers.emptyMessage: Invite a first member to build your team.
cabinetMembers.removeConfirm: {name} will immediately lose access to the cabinet. Data they already created is retained.
cabinetMembers.inviteDesc: An activation email (set password) will be sent to the member.

cabinetMgmt.billingEmptyMessage: No invoice has been created for this practice yet.

platformAdmin.hubSubtitle: Manage the platform structure — establishments, organisations and access — without accessing patients' health data.
platformAdmin.hubTenantsDesc: Create and configure organisations (practices, hospitals) and their country.
platformAdmin.hubEstablishmentsDesc: Manage care establishments and their configuration.
platformAdmin.hubBootstrapDesc: Initialise an establishment by inviting its first administrator.
platformAdmin.tenantsSubtitle: Organisations group one or more establishments and carry the country (which drives the verification policy).
platformAdmin.tenantsEmptyMessage: Create a first organisation to attach establishments.
platformAdmin.tenantServiceCount: {count, plural, =0 {No establishment} one {# establishment} other {# establishments}}
platformAdmin.tenantCreateDesc: Enter the name and, where applicable, the organisation's country.
platformAdmin.assignNote: Attaching an establishment moves it to this organisation (its previous attachment is replaced).
platformAdmin.bootstrapSubtitle: Invites the first administrator (managing clinician) of an establishment. Refused if a principal administrator already exists.
platformAdmin.bootstrapNote: An activation email (set password) will be sent. The administrator gets the management capability (team & billing) on this establishment.
platformAdmin.hubPoliciesDesc: Set the verification mode (required / bounded provisional) per organisation or country.
platformAdmin.hubPsDesc: Review and validate submitted registration proofs.
platformAdmin.hubPersonnelDesc: Search an account, review its access and revoke it (incident / offboarding).
platformAdmin.policiesSubtitle: The verification mode governs clinical-access opening. Resolution: organisation, then country, then the default “required” (fail-secure).
platformAdmin.policiesEmptyMessage: No policy set — the default “required” applies everywhere.
platformAdmin.policyProvisionalHint: Provisional mode requires a future expiry date and is forbidden in production without pilot authorisation.
platformAdmin.psSubtitle: Review proofs submitted by professionals and decide (validated / rejected).
platformAdmin.psEmptyMessage: All submitted proofs have been processed.
platformAdmin.personnelSubtitle: Search an account to review its memberships and capabilities, and revoke access on incident.
platformAdmin.personnelSearchHint: Search matches the exact first or last name (secure index).
